name: agape
description: Agape Counseling Services — static rebuild (Astro 4 + Tailwind 3 + DaisyUI 4). Phase 1 hosted on Cloudflare Pages; Phase 1 demo deployed to demo.mophe.us/agape/.

scripts.build: npm run check:faq && npm run check:logo-size && astro build
scripts.check: npm run check:faq && npm run check:logo-size && astro check
scripts.check:handoff: node -e "import('./src/config/site.ts').then(m => { const p = m.listPlaceholders(); if (p.length) { console.error('Found ' + p.length + ' unfilled placeholder(s):'); p.forEach(({key, value}) => console.error('  ' + key + ' = ' + value)); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('No unfilled placeholders.'); } })"
